title: Malaysian Nori Wraps
description: A fusion of Malaysian flavors and Japanese nori wraps, perfect for a quick snack or lunch.
instructions: 2. Lay a nori sheet flat on a surface.
3. Spread a small amount of silky sauce on the nori sheet, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
4. Place a small amount of softened fiordilatte cheese in the center of the nori sheet.
5. Add a spoonful of salty sauce on top of the cheese.
6. Drizzle malaysian chili sauce on top of the salty sauce.
7. Fold the bottom edge of the nori sheet up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap.
9. Serve the nori wraps immediately, or store them in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
